specific_question: Did MediConn Solutions partner with a software implementation and management company to help with CRM data storage in Q1, 2025?
answer: Yes. MediConn Solutions began a partnership with CorsicaTech between January 1 and March 31, 2025 following a board management meeting in the begining of 2025.
dr_question: According to an article in WTT Solutions in March 2025, Customer Relations Management (CRM) is an important component of any healthcare business plan. What would a business development representative look for in CRM software that would contribute to MediConn Solutions' business growth in 2026?
